title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM EX (Exposure) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM EX (Exposure) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw exposure data, (2) Derive USUBJID and EXSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: EXTRT, EXDOSE, EXDOSU, EXROUTE, EXSTDTC, EXENDTC, (4) Handle dose mapping, route of administration, treatment period derivation from dosing records, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 2772 records.
